Container.Name: PrintHub
Container.Overview: Self-hosted 3D print request queue. Friends or customers upload STLs to a Kanban board (To Do, In Progress, Done); files stay as plain files on your array, organized by status. Built-in accounts, live board updates, and an admin-only settings page. The first person to open the web UI claims the admin account, so open it right after starting the container.

Config.Name: WebUI Port
Config.Description: Port for the PrintHub web interface.

Config.Name: App data
Config.Description: PrintHub's database and settings. Keep on appdata.

Config.Name: Print files
Config.Description: Share where your STL files live. PrintHub keeps them as plain files in todo/, in-progress/, and done/ folders.
